description:
Move fz_halt and fz_print_value. fz_print_value depends on the render_* fns — keep them in ir_codegen.rs for now (their move is fz-ul4.23.4.3) and reach back via crate::ir_codegen::render_fz_value, etc.

After fz-ul4.23.4.3 lands, this ticket's reach-back gets retargeted to fz_value::debug.

## Acceptance

- cargo test green.
title: Extract halt + print FFI (fz_halt, fz_print_value)
